Preconditions: Logged in as regular user (not admin)
Steps:
1. Login as user with role='admin' or 'sdr'
2. Navigate to /app/launcher.html
Expected Result:
1. Page loads successfully
2. Welcome message with user name
3. Three module cards visible
4. User menu in topbar
5. No redirect to admin panels

Steps:
1. View launcher
2. Check topbar user menu
Expected Result:
Displays:
- User first name in greeting
- Full name in dropdown
- Email address
- Role (formatted, e.g., 'Account Executive')
- Organisation name (if applicable)

Steps:
1. Login as any user
2. View launcher
Expected Result:
Sales OS card:
- NOT locked
- No lock icon
- Badge: 'Always Free'
- Clickable
- No lock note visible

Test Name: Sales OS Card - Click Opens System
Expected Result:
Redirected to /system/index.html
Sales OS application loads

Steps:
1. Login as user without CRM
2. View launcher
Expected Result:
CRM card:
- Shows lock overlay
- Lock icon visible
- Lock note displayed: 'CRM Locked - Contact administrator'
- Card has .locked CSS class

Steps:
1. Set crm_enabled=true for user
2. Login and view launcher
Expected Result:
CRM card:
- NOT locked
- No lock overlay
- Clickable
- Lock note hidden

Alert shown:
'CRM access is locked. Contact your administrator...'
No redirect
Stays on launcher

Redirected to /crm/index.html
CRM application loads successfully

Steps:
1. Login as user without B2B0
2. View launcher
Expected Result:
B2B0 card:
- Locked
- Purple badge: '💎 Paid Add-On (7-Day Trial)'
- Lock note: 'Independent module. Works with or without CRM'
- Link to pricing

Steps:
1. Set b2b0_enabled=true
2. Login and view launcher
Expected Result:
B2B0 card:
- Unlocked
- Clickable
- Lock note hidden
- Purple badge still visible

Alert: 'B2B0 access is locked...'
Redirected to /pricing.html
Can view B2B0 pricing plans

Test Name: Module Independence - Sales OS + B2B0 Only
Expected Result:
1. Set user entitlements as above
2. Login and view launcher
Actual Result:
Module states:
- Sales OS: Unlocked
- CRM: Locked
- B2B0: Unlocked
Proves B2B0 works without CRM

Steps:
1. Click user name in topbar
2. Verify dropdown content
Expected Result:
Dropdown shows:
- User profile info
- 'My Profile' option
- 'Reset Password' option
- 'Sign Out' option
- Options clickable

1. Session destroyed
2. Redirected to /app/auth.html
3. Cannot access launcher without re-login

Steps:
1. Open DevTools Network tab
2. Load launcher
3. Check API calls
Expected Result:
1. Subscription query executes
2. Response time < 500ms
3. Single query (not multiple)
4. Includes all needed fields (crm_enabled, b2b0_enabled)
